mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.type, p.event_date, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.published_at, p.category_id FROM post p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.type = 'blog'
AND p.id IN ( SELECT pt.post_id FROM post_tag pt INNER JOIN tag t ON t.id = pt.tag_id WHERE t.slug = #{tagSlug} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM category c WHERE c.id = p.category_id AND c.slug = #{categorySlug} )
AND MATCH(p.title, p.content) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE)
ORDER BY p.published_at DESC

SELECT p.id, p.title, p.slug, p.summary, p.cover_image, p.type, p.event_date, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.published_at, p.category_id FROM post p WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.type = 'ai_timeline' ORDER BY p.event_date DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(published_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS published, SUM(view_count) AS views FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND published_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(published_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT c.name AS name, COUNT(p.id) AS value FROM category c LEFT JOIN post p ON p.category_id = c.id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT t.name AS name, COUNT(pt.post_id) AS value FROM tag t LEFT JOIN post_tag pt ON pt.tag_id = t.id LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id = pt.post_id AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 GROUP BY t.id, t.name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1) AS publishedPosts, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 0) AS draftPosts, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM post WHERE deleted = 0) AS totalViews, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tag) AS totalTags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM category) AS totalCategories
